case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. FABIOLA SOLORIO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS OF REDUCED FEES AND VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SOLORIO, FABIOLA SOLORIO, IGNACIO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2013
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SOLORIO, IGNACIO DOES 1 TO 25
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SOLORIO, FABIOLA
DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLORIO, FABIOLA $1,777.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,777.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
